title: Section 38
content: The Reserve Bank shall, on a request in writing from the Corporation, furnish to it any report or information relating to an insured bank 1[or a credit institution] made or obtained by it under or in pursuance of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or 2[the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (10 of 1949).]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 21 of 1978, s. 8 (w.e.f. 15-7-1978). 2. Subs. by s. 2, ibid., for "the Banking Companies Act, 1949" (w.e.f. 1-7-1971).
